description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
July 16, 2025 at 9:58 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Euclid Court near Broadway.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on Broadway and made a left turn onto Euclid Court. After completing its turn, the Waymo 
AV came to a stop, yielding to an SUV stopped in-lane. The SUV began reversing and the rear of the SUV made contact with the front of 
the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
